tasks.subject: Task 1: Database Migrations
tasks.description: Create all 8 migration files for new tables, columns, triggers, and RLS policies.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — Project Members Service
tasks.description: Build CRUD endpoints for project members and pending invites.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend — Work Links & Enhanced Collaboration
tasks.description: Add work file/audio link endpoints, invite-with-stakes, decline, accept-from-dashboard, auto-transition.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend — Shared Hooks & Components
tasks.description: Build reusable hooks (useProjectMembers, useWorkFiles, useWorkAudio) and InlineEdit component.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Frontend — Project Detail Page
tasks.description: Rewrite ProjectDetail.tsx with 5-tab layout (Works, Files, Audio, Members, Settings).

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — Portfolio Simplification
tasks.description: Simplify Portfolio to card grid with My Projects + Shared with Me sections.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend — Registry Dashboard Redesign
tasks.description: Redesign Registry as read-only tracking dashboard with summary cards + 4 tabs.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — WorkDetail Updates + Enhanced Invite
tasks.description: Remove disputed status, add file/audio links, inline rename, enhanced invite form.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — Zoe & OneClick Integration
tasks.description: Add shared works document source to Zoe and works source to OneClick.
